title: astracantha parnassi subsp. calabrica
intro: Astracantha parnassi subsp. calabrica, also known as Astragalus calabricus, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties that can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The health benefits of Astracantha parnassi subsp. calabrica include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. Astracantha parnassi subsp. calabrica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
